dialogues.speaker: Dr. Cedar
lines: Good timing. The joy meters around town are finally stable.
Take one starter JoyMon before you step onto Route 1.
A partner and a few Sync Capsules are enough to begin.

dialogues.speaker: Dr. Cedar
lines: Your JoyMon will grow after real battles, not training dummies.
If the grove wears you down, find the healer near its entrance.
Come back after the trial. I want to see your notes.

dialogues.speaker: Sleepy Route Guard
lines: Hold it. Route 1 looks calm until the grass starts buzzing.
No JoyMon, no route pass.
Dr. Cedar can fix that.

dialogues.speaker: Sleepy Route Guard
lines: Route 1 is open. Stay on the pale path if you need a breather.
The tall grass is good practice, but do not waste every Berry Tonic.
Trial Grove is north. The healer waits just inside.

dialogues.speaker: Tutorial Kid
lines: Tall grass can start wild battles after you receive a starter.
Use Sync Capsules to capture weakened wild JoyMon.
Press Escape for your party, and I for your bag.

dialogues.speaker: Tired Operator
lines: I watched the route monitors all night.
Queuebee are quick, Rootsnail are sturdy, and Cindermite hits harder than it looks.
A Berry Tonic at the right time beats panic every time.

dialogues.speaker: Sign
lines: Cedar Field Lab: starters, field notes, and emergency coffee.

dialogues.speaker: Sign
lines: North: Route 1. Trainers should carry a starter and at least one tonic.

dialogues.speaker: Route Guide
lines: The path is safe, but the grass gives better practice.
If Kai challenges you, use your strongest move and heal before Trial Grove.
The grove entrance is straight north.

dialogues.speaker: Sign
lines: North: Trial Grove.
Warning: the lantern gate only opens for trainers who keep moving forward.

dialogues.speaker: Grove Healer
lines: The grove can be noisy for a first trial.
Rest here. Your party is healed and ready.

dialogues.speaker: Sign
lines: Trial Grove: follow the pale trail when you are tired.
Step into the grass if your partner needs more battle rhythm.

dialogues.speaker: Grove Scout
lines: Glimmoo hide in the shady patches. They are gentle, but they do not quit.
The healer is by the entrance, so loop back before the gate if you need to.
